From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Italian film producer

| Giuseppe Amato | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Born | Giuseppe Vasaturo[[1]](#cite_note-JFC-1)  (1899-08-24)24 August 1899  [Naples](/wiki/Naples "Naples"), [Kingdom of Italy](/wiki/Kingdom_of_Italy "Kingdom of Italy") |
| Died | 3 February 1964(1964-02-03) (aged 64)  [Rome](/wiki/Rome "Rome"), Italy |
| Occupations | Film producer, screenwriter, director |
| Years active | 1932–1961 |

**Giuseppe Amato** (born **Giuseppe Vasaturo**; 24 August 1899 – 3 February 1964) was an Italian film producer, screenwriter and director. He produced 58 films between 1932 and 1961, and is especially known for *[Bicycle Thieves](/wiki/Bicycle_Thieves "Bicycle Thieves")*.[[2]](#cite_note-Halliwell-2)
He was born in [Naples](/wiki/Naples "Naples") and died in [Rome](/wiki/Rome "Rome") from a heart attack.

## Selected filmography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Giuseppe_Amato&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Selected filmography")]

* *[Five to Nil](/wiki/Five_to_Nil "Five to Nil")* (1932)
* *[Three Lucky Fools](/wiki/Three_Lucky_Fools "Three Lucky Fools")* (1933)
* *[The Little Schoolmistress](/wiki/The_Little_Schoolmistress_(1934_film) "The Little Schoolmistress (1934 film)")* (1934)
* *[Territorial Militia](/wiki/Territorial_Militia "Territorial Militia")* (1935)
* *[Those Two](/wiki/Those_Two "Those Two")* (1935)
* *[Thirty Seconds of Love](/wiki/Thirty_Seconds_of_Love "Thirty Seconds of Love")* (1936)
* *[The Man Who Smiles](/wiki/The_Man_Who_Smiles "The Man Who Smiles")* (1936)
* *[I Don't Know You Anymore](/wiki/I_Don%27t_Know_You_Anymore "I Don't Know You Anymore")* (1936)
* *[The Castiglioni Brothers](/wiki/The_Castiglioni_Brothers "The Castiglioni Brothers")* (1937)
* *[It Was I!](/wiki/It_Was_I! "It Was I!")* (1937)
* *L'amor mio non muore* (1938)
* *[The House of Shame](/wiki/The_House_of_Shame_(1938_film) "The House of Shame (1938 film)")* (1938)
* *[The Count of Brechard](/wiki/The_Count_of_Brechard "The Count of Brechard")* (1938)
* *[The Document](/wiki/The_Document "The Document")* (1939)
* *[Heartbeat](/wiki/Heartbeat_(1939_film) "Heartbeat (1939 film)")* (1939)
* *[Unjustified Absence](/wiki/Unjustified_Absence "Unjustified Absence")* (1939)
* *[Department Store](/wiki/Department_Store_(1939_film) "Department Store (1939 film)")* (1939)
* *[Eternal Melodies](/wiki/Eternal_Melodies "Eternal Melodies")* (1940)
* *[A Romantic Adventure](/wiki/A_Romantic_Adventure "A Romantic Adventure")* (1940)
* *[Red Roses](/wiki/Red_Roses_(1940_film) "Red Roses (1940 film)")* (1940 - director) *Rose scarlatte*, co-directed with [Vittorio De Sica](/wiki/Vittorio_De_Sica "Vittorio De Sica")
* *[The Jester's Supper](/wiki/The_Jester%27s_Supper_(film) "The Jester's Supper (film)")* (1942)
* *[Four Steps in the Clouds](/wiki/Four_Steps_in_the_Clouds "Four Steps in the Clouds")* (1942)[[2]](#cite_note-Halliwell-2)
* *[Before the Postman](/wiki/Before_the_Postman "Before the Postman")* (1942)
* *[The Peddler and the Lady](/wiki/The_Peddler_and_the_Lady "The Peddler and the Lady")* (1943)
* *[Apparition](/wiki/Apparition_(1943_film) "Apparition (1943 film)")* (1943)
* *[Shoeshine](/wiki/Shoeshine_(film) "Shoeshine (film)")* (also known as *Shoeshine Boys*) (1946)[[2]](#cite_note-Halliwell-2)
* *[Rome, Open City](/wiki/Rome,_Open_City "Rome, Open City")* (1945)[[2]](#cite_note-Halliwell-2)
* *Malìa* (1946)
* *[Christmas at Camp 119](/wiki/Christmas_at_Camp_119 "Christmas at Camp 119")* (1948)
* *[Yvonne la Nuit](/wiki/Yvonne_la_Nuit "Yvonne la Nuit")* (1949)
* *[Paris Is Always Paris](/wiki/Paris_Is_Always_Paris "Paris Is Always Paris")* (1951)
* *[A Thief in Paradise](/wiki/A_Thief_in_Paradise_(1952_film) "A Thief in Paradise (1952 film)")* (1952)
* *[Umberto D.](/wiki/Umberto_D. "Umberto D.")* (1952)[[2]](#cite_note-Halliwell-2)
* *[The Return of Don Camillo](/wiki/The_Return_of_Don_Camillo "The Return of Don Camillo")* (1952)[[2]](#cite_note-Halliwell-2)
* *[Donne proibite](/wiki/Angels_of_Darkness "Angels of Darkness")* (1953)
* *[The Last Five Minutes](/wiki/The_Last_Five_Minutes "The Last Five Minutes") - Gli ultimi cinque minuti* (1955)
* *[Move and I'll Shoot](/wiki/Move_and_I%27ll_Shoot "Move and I'll Shoot")* (1958)
* *[Arrivederci Roma](/wiki/Arrivederci_Roma_(film) "Arrivederci Roma (film)")* (1958 - writer)
* *[The Facts of Murder](/wiki/The_Facts_of_Murder "The Facts of Murder")* (1959)
* *[La Dolce Vita](/wiki/La_Dolce_Vita "La Dolce Vita")* (1960)[[2]](#cite_note-Halliwell-2)
